# Project Gorgon CDN Data Schema

**Source:** `https://cdn.projectgorgon.com/v470/data/`  (version 470)

**Generated by** `data/introspect_schema.py` against snapshots in `data/cdn-snapshots/` (gitignored). Re-run after re-downloading to refresh.

**Method:** every field's coverage, observed types, sample value, and enum-like distinct values are *measured* by walking the JSON, not summarised by a model.
